So um we are doing post every single day uh and that's super important because google essentially is ranking these, these pages based on two primary factors, right? One is going to be the frequency with which your posting, it's really important to google that they are listing active pages as high as possible, right? So if you're not posting once a week or once every two weeks, um you're already, you know, far behind the curve, right? And it's going to take someone who's actually searching for your property and google to find you right? If I just type in apartments in Saint paul, um if you don't have an active google page, you're not gonna come up, that's just kind of the way it works. Um So we take, we take pages that maybe are posting once a month or less or once a week, once every two weeks or whatever we do it every single day. The other factor that google considers when ranking is the uniqueness of the content. Um And what I mean by uniqueness of content is a number of things. It's it's the one, it's your your actual post. Do you have posts on your on your google pages? And what does that content look like? You have additional products for plants? Do you? What are your photos?
